summary: 2026-06-14 08:46:04 PDT (-0700) Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/display-update-cadence.md`. The implementation mostly matches the approved spec, but I found one cadence propagation bug for non-running sessions.

findings.title: Visible overlay is not refreshed on cadence changes when the session is not running
findings.claim: The immediate overlay refresh effect only depends on `overlayOn`, `session.status`, and `postOverlay`; `postOverlay` reads `displayIntervalSeconds` through `liveRef`, so changing the cadence does not change the callback identity and does not trigger this effect. During a paused or ended session there is no running 1-second tick to call `postOverlay`, so the preview updates to the new cadence while the on-camera overlay keeps using the old `displayIntervalSeconds`. That breaks the spec's requirement that cadence applies to the on-camera overlay and that the preview shows exactly what viewers see.
findings.suggestion: Trigger `postOverlay()` when `config.displayIntervalSeconds` changes while `overlayOn` is true, either by adding `config.displayIntervalSeconds` to this effect's dependency list or by adding a dedicated effect for cadence changes.
